entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A climate-resilient nutritious crop capable of giving economic returns in marginal agro-ecologies

entities.name: IRON CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of iron (Fe) present in the grain of pearl millet

entities.name: ZINC CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of zinc (Zn) present in the grain of pearl millet

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Genomic regions associated with the variation of quantitative traits like iron and zinc content

entities.name: DIVERSITY ARRAY TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: A technology used to identify markers for genetic mapping

entities.name: SIMPLE SEQUENCE REPEATS
entities.description: A type of genetic marker used to generate a genetic linkage map

entities.name: GENETIC LINKAGE MAP
entities.description: A map showing the relative positions of loci on each chromosome

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINE
entities.description: A population derived from a cross between two parents used for QTL analysis

entities.name: ICMS 8511-S1-17-2-1-1-B-P03
entities.description: One of the parents used in the cross to generate the RIL population

entities.name: AIMP 92901-S1-183-2-2-B-08
entities.description: An Iniadi line with high grain Fe and Zn, used as a parent in the cross

entities.name: TOGOLESE REPUBLIC
entities.description: The origin of the AIMP 92901-S1-183-2-2-B-08 line

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The region where the Togolese Republic is located

entities.name: EPISTASIS INTERACTIONS
entities.description: Interactions between different genes that affect the expression of a trait

entities.name: DIGENIC INTERACTION
entities.description: Interaction between two genes affecting a trait

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method using markers to select for desired traits

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method using genome-wide markers to predict phenotypic performance

entities.name: POPULATION IMPROVEMENT PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs aimed at enhancing the genetic quality of a crop population

entities.name: MARGINAL AGRO-ECOLOGIES
entities.description: Environments with low productivity where pearl millet is capable of giving economic returns
